title: NIR-II fluorescence imaging using indocyanine green nanoparticles.
author: Bhavane R Starosolski Z Stupin I Ghaghada KB Annapragada A
content: S-EPMC6160486 PMC6160486 NIR-II fluorescence imaging using indocyanine green nanoparticles. Fluorescence imaging in the second near-infrared window (NIR-II) holds promise for real-time deep tissue imaging. In this work, we investigated the NIR-II fluorescence properties of a liposomal formulation
